site.title: Multilingual Blog
site.description: Sharing stories, ideas, and insights from around the world.
about.title: About Us
about.description: We are a global collective of writers, designers, and developers dedicated to bridging the gap between cultures through high-quality, multilingual content.
about.story.title: Our Story
about.story.content: We are passionate about connecting people across languages and cultures. Our multilingual blog platform serves as a bridge between different communities, sharing knowledge and perspectives globally.
about.story.extra: Founded in 2024, our platform started as a simple idea: that language should be a bridge, not a barrier. Today, we host contributors from over 15 countries.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.content: To break down language barriers and create an inclusive space for sharing ideas, stories, and experiences in multiple languages.
about.team.title: Our Team
about.team.description: Our core team of editors and curators.
about.team.sarah.name: Sarah Johnson
about.team.ahmed.name: Ahmed Hassan
about.team.sarah.bio: An experienced editor with a passion for global storytelling and cross-cultural communication.
about.team.ahmed.bio: Directing our content strategy to ensure we reach and resonate with audiences in every language.
about.join.title: Want to join our global team?
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Have a question or suggestion? We'd love to hear from you. Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.form.name: Name
contact.email.title: Email Us
contact.follow.title: Follow Us
contact.success.title: Message Sent!
contact.success.message: Thank you for reaching out. We have received your message and will get back to you soon.
contact.error: There was an error sending your message. Please try again.
footer.description: Sharing stories, ideas, and insights from around the world.
footer.quote: To have another language is to possess a second soul.
blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Insights, stories, and tutorials from our multilingual community.
search.devModeDesc: Pagefind only works after a production build. Run npm run build and npm run preview to test search locally.
home.latest.title: Latest Posts
home.latest.desc: Discover our most recent stories and updates.
